user.title: Add HomieProxy instance
user.description: Create a new HTTP proxy endpoint. An initial access token will be generated automatically — you can manage tokens later via the integration's Configure dialog.

data.name: Endpoint name
data.restrict_out_cidrs: Custom outbound CIDRs (one per line, only used when 'Custom CIDR list' is selected)
data.restrict_in_cidrs: Inbound IP CIDR allow-list (one per line, blank = allow any)
data.requires_auth: Require Home Assistant authentication on top of the token

error.invalid_name: Name must be at least 2 characters
error.invalid_cidr: One or more CIDR entries are invalid
error.custom_requires_cidrs: Custom mode requires at least one CIDR
error.already_configured: An endpoint with this name already exists

abort.already_configured: An endpoint with this name already exists

init.title: Configure HomieProxy
init.description: Pick a section to edit. Changes apply immediately when you save each step.

tokens.title: Manage access tokens
tokens.description: Currently {count} token(s). Edit the list (one per line) or pick an action below. Choosing an action other than 'Save changes' will append/replace tokens — pick 'Save changes' afterward to persist the result.

restrictions.title: Network restrictions
restrictions.description: Outbound mode controls which target URLs the proxy will call. 'Custom CIDR list' uses the outbound CIDRs below; the other modes ignore that field. Inbound CIDRs limit which client IPs may reach this endpoint (blank = any).

settings.title: Auth, timeout & streaming
settings.description: Stream chunk size: 0 = low-latency (recommended for live MJPEG/HLS — yields bytes as they arrive). Any value > 0 buffers up to N bytes per write, trading latency for throughput. Increase only for steady high-bandwidth bulk transfers; for live video, 0 is almost always correct.

data.requires_auth: Require Home Assistant authentication on top of the token
data.debug_requires_auth: Require HA authentication on the /debug endpoint

info.title: Endpoint info

error.invalid_cidr: One or more CIDR entries are invalid
error.custom_requires_cidrs: Custom mode requires at least one CIDR
error.tokens_empty: At least one token is required
